chapter_title.ar: باب شُرْبِ الْمَاءِ مِنْ قِيَامٍ وَ الشُّرْبِ فِي نَفَسٍ وَاحِدٍ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 4 – Drinking the water whilst standing and drinking it in one breath

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/232)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/232)
text: شُرْبُ الْمَاءِ مِنْ قِيَامٍ بِالنَّهَارِ أَقْوَى وَ أَصَحُّ لِلْبَدَنِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Al Nowfaly, from Al Sakuny,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Drinking the water whilst standing at daytime is strengthening and corrective for the body’.
en.sarwar: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from al-Nawfaliy from al-Sakuniy who has said the following: “Abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ’During the day drinking water when standing gives the body more power and good health.’”
